kept.text:
Fortinet ( $FTNT): Quiet in the AI Data Center Buildout — Primed for Physical AI Edge Security

Here’s the under-appreciated asymmetry:

1/ Right now the market is laser-focused on hyperscale build-outs. Broadcom Tomahawk 6 switches delivering 102.4 Tbps of throughput, Cisco Silicon One fabrics, 800G/1.6T interconnects, massive GPU clusters.

Fortinet sells switches too, but they lack the extreme throughput needed for these ultra-high-bandwidth AI fabrics. Their portfolio is strong for secure enterprise and campus aggregation — not for saturating the all-to-all traffic patterns inside frontier training clusters. On top of that, you don’t need a firewall on every rack or cluster. An entire AI data hall can require thousands of switches yet only a fraction as many security enforcement points.

Result: Fortinet isn’t capturing massive share in the current data-center networking surge. Fair observation.

2/ Zoom out. The real prize sits one layer deeper: physical AI.
Embodied intelligence. Humanoids and advanced robotics flooding factory floors, warehouses, and digitized manufacturing. This isn’t “more GPUs.” This is OT — operational technology — being fully subsumed by AI. Cyber-physical systems at massive scale.

3/ Here’s the critical insight most cybersecurity narratives miss:
Endpoint security will not scale here.
Traditional OT environments already prove it — non-standard OSes, real-time constraints, tiny memory/storage footprints, and extreme patch aversion make agent-based protection impractical or impossible. Adding bloat to a robotic arm or PLC is a non-starter.

Hackers understand this asymmetry perfectly. The attack surface is exploding while defensibility at the endpoint collapses.

4/ What does scale?
Network-centric security.
Micro-segmentation at wire speed. Deep packet inspection. Virtual patching for unpatchable assets. Industrial protocol awareness that actually understands what a robotic controller or PLC is supposed to be doing. Zero-trust enforcement without touching the endpoints themselves.
This is where Fortinet’s architecture shines.

5/ Their differentiator: the FortiGate 40F series — compact, fanless, desktop-sized firewalls powered by custom SP5 ASIC silicon.

Wire-speed performance in tight edge footprints. Extremely affordable at scale. Paired with FortiGuard OT intelligence (protocol decoders + virtual patching) and the Security Fabric, it creates an agentless shield purpose-built for dense, harsh, non-standard environments.

6/ Fortinet’s time to shine arrives with inference at the edge in physical AI.

Even heavily quantized models will deliver remarkable intelligence locally on humanoids and robots. This enables rich on-device reasoning with less frequent cloud round-trips — reducing latency and bandwidth dependency while increasing autonomy.

The result: millions of distributed, semi-autonomous cyber-physical nodes across smart factories worldwide. Each floor becomes its own secured micro-environment. The cumulative opportunity for compact, affordable network security solutions in this distributed world will dwarf today’s concentrated hyperscale deployments in total unit volume and footprint.

Fortinet isn’t competing on Tomahawk volumes today.
It’s quietly building the moat for the larger, messier, more defensible layer tomorrow.

Underrated setup.

kept.text:
Taiwan borsasının toplam piyasa değeri 4,47 trilyon dolara geldi. 

Taiwan borsasının bu olağanüstü performansının arkasındaki kilit faktör küresel yapay zeka boom'u oldu. Bu durum, başta Nvidia, Broadcom, OpenAI, Google ve Meta gibi teknoloji devlerinden gelen devasa yarı iletken talebini körükledi. 
Yerel endeksin neredeyse %45'ini oluşturan TSMC'nin piyasa değeri bu süreçte 1,8 trilyon dolara şişti.  (Bloomberg) Dünyanın en büyük çip üreticisi olan TSMC, tek başına borsanın kaderini belirliyor.
Taiwan borsası önce 16 Nisan 2026'da İngiltere'yi geçti; o tarihte toplam piyasa değeri 4,14 trilyon dolara ulaşmıştı.

Not: Altının onsu 36.000 dolar olursa bizim için harika olur...
